current_state: When a cycle count disagrees with the ERP, staff adjust the ERP on-hand quantity to match the count directly, with no approval step and no recorded reason code.
observed_gap: Inventory adjustments lack review, reason codes, and root-cause analysis, so recurring accuracy problems are masked rather than corrected.
business_impact: Persistent record inaccuracy drives stockouts on fast movers and undermines trust in ERP stock figures for purchasing and finance.

control_risk.description: Unrestricted, unreviewed adjustments are a segregation-of-duties and shrink-concealment risk.

consultant_notes: Introducing an approval threshold and mandatory reason codes is a plausible quick win; confirm ERP supports reason codes.
